Fountainspring Cave, Sinnoh (location)

This is the Pokémon Location guide for Fountainspring Cave in Sinnoh.

Choose which generation of games you're playing to see the Pokémon and capture methods.

Generation 8

Walking

Walking in grass or a cave

Pokémon Games Times Rarity Levels Details
Psyduck BDSP COMMON 16-20
Bidoof BDSP COMMON 16-20

Gastrodon BDSP COMMON 16-20
